title: ATS Resume Optimizer
description: An AI-powered resume optimization tool that intelligently adapts resumes to specific job descriptions for maximum ATS compatibility. Uses OpenAI GPT-4o-mini with 14 distinct ATS strategies, programmatic keyword verification, iterative refinement, and 40 premium themes with live preview and PDF export.
highlights: 14 ATS optimization strategies including keyword frequency, semantic skill clustering, and STAR-style bullets
Programmatic keyword verification with computed match % separate from LLM scoring
40 premium resume themes with configurable accent colors and live preview
Job URL scraping supporting Greenhouse, Lever, Workday, LinkedIn, and Indeed
Iterative refinement with up to N optimization passes tracking missing keywords and scores
PDF export via headless Chromium with A4 formatting

title: Dynamic Task Scheduler
description: An AI task-scheduling agent that accepts natural-language task descriptions with deadlines, durations, meetings, and energy constraints, then uses OpenAI GPT-4o to produce prioritized, time-blocked schedules with markdown table exports.
highlights: Natural language input for tasks, deadlines, durations, and energy constraints
GPT-4o powered scheduling with urgency, importance, and constraint awareness
Markdown table export with smart section grouping for identical schedules
CLI and programmatic usage with rate limit and quota handling

title: Helio Supervisor
description: A hierarchical supervisor agent for goal-oriented workflows supporting multiple LLM providers, RAG over local documents, and six built-in tools. Features both a Streamlit web UI and a Rich CLI with optional human-in-the-loop approval and persistent conversation memory.
highlights: Multi-provider LLM support — OpenAI, Ollama (local), Google Gemini, Perplexity
Six built-in tools: plan_tasks, web_fetch, code_exec, write_note, summarize_text, rag_search
RAG over local documents using FAISS + BGE embeddings with optional offline mode
Human-in-the-loop approval for code execution, web fetch, and note writing
Dual interfaces — Streamlit web UI and Rich CLI with shared supervisor logic
Persistent JSONL conversation log and agent-written notes

title: Legal Researcher Pro
description: A Streamlit-based legal research and summarization tool where users paste clauses or legal questions, choose a jurisdiction (Australia, USA, or India), and receive structured analysis with confidence scoring and recommended next steps powered by GPT-4o.
highlights: Jurisdiction-aware research supporting Australian, USA, and Indian law
Structured JSON output with legal analysis, confidence score, and recommended next steps
Citation integrity enforcement — no fabricated cases or statutes
Neutral multi-perspective analysis with explicit uncertainty handling
Color-coded confidence badges (high/medium/low) in a legal-themed dark UI

title: Self-Critiquing Planner
description: A Streamlit app that converts high-level goals into structured plans using GPT-4o, runs a second GPT-4o pass to critique them, and supports human review and simulated execution through a Planner-Critic-Human-Executor pipeline with adaptive session memory.
highlights: Goal-to-plan decomposition with structured JSON steps including type and risk assessment
Second-pass GPT-4o critique for gaps, ambiguity, risk, and safety analysis
Human-in-the-loop plan editing and step-level approval before execution
Simulated execution engine for shell, code, manual, and plan-type steps
Session memory with adaptive context for improved future planning
Domain presets — Code Refactor, Learning Plan, Workflow Design, Generic
